senses.gloss: to be smooth and even, to be lank
to make smooth, to even, to make lank
any shoots or twigs which are long and slender

examples.text: يُبَارِينَ الأَعِنَّةَ مُصْعِدَاتٍ عَلَى أَكْتَافِهَا الأَسَلُ الظِّمَاءُ
examples.english: They pull at the rein, going upward; on their shoulders are spears thirsting (for the blood of the enemy).

senses.gloss: to draw or pull out slowly
